strengths: 13+ years of full-stack engineering experience spanning web, mobile, desktop and embedded — far exceeding the 6+ year requirement

Directly relevant current role at re:cinq building AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators and agentic workflows using TypeScript/Node.js — matching the primary stack and the AI agent requirement
Proven polyglot proficiency across TypeScript, Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent ecosystems plus hands-on AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB and CI/CD — covering the full required toolchain
concerns: Resume emphasizes Node.js, React and Ember.js but does not explicitly mention Nest.js or Vitest by name
Kotlin is not listed among the languages, though strong Java background provides a close adjacent skill
React experience is mentioned but less prominent than backend and DLang work across the career history

key_factors.factor: Current AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work at re:cinq
Full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React + cloud + Mongo experience matching primary stack
Software craftsmanship discipline — TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing libraries authored

response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally strong match for this Senior Fullstack role: he already builds exactly the kind of internal automation and agentic developer tooling the position targets, using the primary TypeScript/Node.js/React stack at re:cinq today. His 13+ year track record spans high-scale backends (Dunnhumby), fintech (RIDE Capital), AWS-based SaaS (Optilyz), and a self-founded open-source GIS platform deployed on Kubernetes — demonstrating end-to-end ownership, architectural judgment and production reliability. Deep craftsmanship credentials (TDD evangelism, authoring Fluent-Asserts and the Trial test runner, running Refactoring Dojos and Selenium courses) signal he will raise the quality bar through code reviews and testing discipline, while his polyglot background (Java, C/C++, DLang, Python-adjacent) means picking up Nest.js, Vitest and Kotlin is a low-risk extension of skills he already has.
